mapper.sql: b_approval_flow.approval_flow_id, b_approval_flow.flow_name, b_approval_flow.flow_code, b_approval_flow.business_type, b_approval_flow.description, b_approval_flow.status, b_approval_flow.deleted_flag, b_approval_flow.create_user_id, b_approval_flow.create_user_name, b_approval_flow.create_time, b_approval_flow.update_time
mapper.update: update b_approval_flow set deleted_flag = #{deletedFlag} where approval_flow_id = #{approvalFlowId}
